title: iGEM 2018 Interlab Study Protocol: Calibration 3
author: Ylenia Longo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qpadvie

steps.instruction: - Spin down fluorescein kit tube - Resuspend fluorescein in 1mL of 1x PBS (this is the 10x fluorescein stock solution) - Pipet up and down and make sure that no particulates are visible - Dilute the 10x fluorescein stock solution to a 1x fluorescein stock solution by making a 1:10 dilution (e.g. 100µl 10x fluorescein stock solution and 900µl 1x PBS)
Pipet 100µl 1xPBS into wells A2-A12. Do the same for row B,C and D.
Pipet 200µl of 1x fluorescein stock solution into A1,B1,C1 and D1.

Transfer 100µl of 1x fluorescein stock solution from A1 to A2. Mix 3x by pipetting up and down. Then transfer 100µl from A2 to A3. Mix again 3x by pipetting up and down and transfer again 100µl from A3 to A4. Continue this procedure until arrived at well A11. Mix 3x by pipetting up and down and transfer 100µl into the LIQUID WASTE and NOT in A12. As replicates are performed, the same procedure is performed for row B, C and D as well.
Measure fluorescence: (bandpass width: 520nm/30nm bandpass, 25-30nm width; excitation; 485nm; emission: 520-530nm)
Import your data into the Excel sheet provided by iGEM (fluorescein standard curve tab)
